name: GOLFTEC Lone Tree
address: 10012 Commons St Suite 200, Lone Tree, CO 80124
about: GOLFTEC Lone Tree is a technology-focused golf training studio that provides data-driven instruction and practice facilities. The venue utilizes advanced technology such as OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise swing feedback and club fitting services. Instruction is personalized, with coaches creating game plans based on a student's initial Swing Evaluation. GOLFTEC offers a mix of lessons, club fittings, and practice sessions in its training bays, with the goal of delivering measurable improvement on the course.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise feedback
One-on-one personalized coaching with a clear improvement strategy
Indoor practice facilities with launch monitors and video analysis available
Custom club fitting services using advanced technology for optimal equipment

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of bar or alcohol services.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides clubs for lessons and fittings. For club fitting, you will be fitted with clubs from top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at GOLFTEC Lone Tree, and no indication of outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC is a training studio focused on lessons and practice, not on playing full 18-hole rounds. Practice sessions are tailored to improvement drills, while on-course lessons focus on applying skills in real-world conditions.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs and technology tailored for juniors, with features like easy-to-follow lessons and advanced technology to help young golfers see and understand their progress.
